odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
            
                

                    
                    
                    Welcome to LatinChain
                    
                    
                    
                
                

                    

                        

                            
LatinChain
                            
Authenticating your connection...
                            Pi Sign-in
                        
                        
                        

                        
                        

                            
Welcome!
                            
User: 
                            
Total points: 
                            
Latin points: 
                            
Chess points: 
                            
Sudoku points: 
                            
Snake points: 
                            
Unblocked: 
                            
Available days: 
                            
Winner: 
                            
                            
You have successfully connected.
                            Go to LatinChain
                        
                    

                    
                        async function handlePiCallback() {
                            const statusDiv = document.getElementById("status");
                            const loader = document.getElementById("loader");
                            const userInfo = document.getElementById("user-info");
                            const pisignin = document.getElementById("pisignin");

                            try {
                                const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.hash.slice(1));
                                const expectedState = sessionStorage.getItem("latinchain_pi_oauth_state");
                                sessionStorage.removeItem("latinchain_pi_oauth_state");

                                if (!params.get("access_token")) {
                                    statusDiv.textContent = "Please log in via the LatinChain portal.";
                                    loader.classList.add("hidden");
                                    pisignin.classList.remove("hidden");
                                    return;
                                }

                                if (params.get("state") !== expectedState) {
                                    throw new Error("Security error: State mismatch.");
                                }

                                const accessToken = params.get("access_token");

                                const response = await fetch("https://api.minepi.com/v2/me", {
                                    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` },
                                });

                                if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Could not retrieve account info.");
                                
                                const me = await response.json();

                                document.getElementById("username").textContent = me.username;
                                
                                $.post("https://latin-chain.com/api/get-external-user", data={'pi_user_code': me.username}, function(data, status){
                                    //alert("Result: " + data.result + "\nStatus: " + status + "\nData: " + JSON.stringify(data));
                                    if(data.result)
                                    {
                                        document.getElementById("points").textContent = data.points;
                                        document.getElementById("points_chess").textContent = data.points_chess;
                                        document.getElementById("points_sudoku").textContent = data.points_sudoku;
                                        document.getElementById("points_snake").textContent = data.points_snake;
                                        document.getElementById("points_latin").textContent = data.points_latin;
                                        
                                        if(data.unblocked)
                                        {
                                            document.getElementById("unblocked").textContent = "Yes: You are Unlocked!";
                                            document.getElementById("days_available").textContent = data.days_available;
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            document.getElementById("unblocked").textContent = "No: You are not Unlocked";
                                            document.getElementById("days_available").textContent = data.days_available;
                                        }
                                        
                                        if(data.is_winner)
                                        {
                                            document.getElementById("is_winner").textContent = "Yes: You are Winner!. Check LatinChain Mainscreen";
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            document.getElementById("is_winner").textContent = "No";
                                        }
                                    }
                                });
                                
                                loader.classList.add("hidden");
                                userInfo.classList.remove("hidden");
                                statusDiv.textContent = "Authentication Successful";
                                statusDiv.style.color = "green";
                                
                                history.replaceState(null, "", window.location.pathname);

                            } catch (err) {
                                statusDiv.textContent = "Error: " + err.message;
                                statusDiv.style.color = "red";
                                loader.classList.add("hidden");
                            }
                        }

                        handlePiCallback();
